channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-10 01:51 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: If only we’d trained Grok on just these 2 books, we’d be done already!
item.description: If only we’d trained Grok on just these 2 books, we’d be done already!

item.title: @elonmusk: 🇺🇸 Sundar Pichai had high praise for Elon after spending time with him: “Look, I spent time with Elo...
item.description: 🇺🇸 Sundar Pichai had high praise for Elon after spending time with him: “Look, I spent time with Elon maybe two weeks ago. When I talked to him, his ability to will future technologies into existence is just unparalleled.”xcancel.com/StockYap/status/192338…

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok will never go to therapy. Never.
item.description: Grok will never go to therapy. Never.

item.title: @elonmusk: Read The Story of Civilization by Durant
item.description: Read The Story of Civilization by Durant

item.title: @elonmusk: We need to focus on finishing Colossus 2 and ensuring it is extremely stable, then will build the wa...
item.description: We need to focus on finishing Colossus 2 and ensuring it is extremely stable, then will build the water recycling plant

item.title: @elonmusk: Use 𝕏 Chat for messaging and voice/video calls. Comes with this great benefit of actual privacy.
item.description: Use 𝕏 Chat for messaging and voice/video calls. Comes with this great benefit of actual privacy.

item.title: @elonmusk: I remember this “not-a-flamethrower” moment fondly. It was being sold through Shopify and I had to e...
item.description: I remember this “not-a-flamethrower” moment fondly. It was being sold through Shopify and I had to explain Elon’s shenanigans to risk, underwriting and AUP teams all at the same time to keep it up.

item.title: @elonmusk: No other car can do this
item.description: No other car can do this

item.title: @elonmusk: Kudos to@xAIfor being the first AI company to challenge a Colorado law requiring it to censor truthf...
item.description: Kudos to@xAIfor being the first AI company to challenge a Colorado law requiring it to censor truthful answers if they could have a “differential impact” on protected groups. This is Woke AI. It teaches AI models to lie. And it’s a violation of the First Amendment.

item.title: @elonmusk: We have reached an era where some people have not touched a steering wheel and have simply let their...
item.description: We have reached an era where some people have not touched a steering wheel and have simply let their cars drive them around for a whole year, whereas others do not know this is possible at all.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceXAI Colossus 2 now has 7 models in training: - Imagine V2 - 2 variants of 1T - 2 variants of 1....
item.description: SpaceXAI Colossus 2 now has 7 models in training: - Imagine V2 - 2 variants of 1T - 2 variants of 1.5T - 6T - 10T Some catching up to do.
